summary: Iteration 255: Gallery Showcase Testing Complete. All 18 backend tests passed. All 30 videos have professional titles, presigned URLs for both video and thumbnail, and category filtering/sorting works correctly. Rate limit confirmed at 5/hour. Frontend testing verified 30 video cards with working thumbnails, category filters, sort options, and remix buttons.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays bottom UI - minor visual issue, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 255 verified gallery showcase requirements. All 30 videos have professional titles (no TEST_, Concurrent Test names), presigned R2 URLs for both video and thumbnail, category filtering works (All=30, 2D Cartoon=14, Watercolor=9, Anime=4, Comic Book=2, Claymation=1), sort options work (Newest, Most Remixed, Trending), remix buttons redirect correctly to signup/studio. Rate limit confirmed at 5/hour with test/admin users exempt.
